title: Wand of Better Building
description: This mod adds Builders,Exchanging and Destruction Wands for streamlined building and block swapping, customizable through config.
body:
The Mod has three wands the Exchanging the Builders Wand and the destruction wand. Builders Wand: This tool facilitates construction in the game, allowing users to quickly fill large areas with blocks. Users must have the desired blocks in their inventory. When clicking on a surface, the Builders Wand automatically places the blocks, extending the structure in the chosen direction. It often includes a configuration file for customizing its functionality.

Exchanging Wand: With this tool, players can instantly replace existing blocks with others, without needing to break them first. The block to be replaced must be held in the offhand. This tool simplifies modifications to structures or the redesign of areas by enabling a swift exchange of materials. It typically comes with a configuration file to adjust its behavior.

Destruction Wand: is a versatile tool that can obliterate a large area of blocks with a single click. It offers customizable settings for durability, range, whether blocks drop items, and whether the wand is active.
